files.content:
export const html01AccessibleDataTable = (): string => { return `
Quarterly Revenue by Region
Region Q1 Q2 Q3 Q4
North 10,000 12,000 11,000 14,000
South 9,500 11,500 10,300 12,800
East 10,000 12,000 12,800 16,300
Total 29,500 35,500 34,100 43,100
`; };

export const html04ArticleWithStructuredMetadata = (): string => { return ` Designing Reliable Frontend Benchmarks

Designing Reliable Frontend Benchmarks

November 15, 2024

By Alex Morgan
145 Market Street, Suite 500, San Francisco, CA 94103, USA

Benchmarking frontend systems is easy to start and hard to do well. Without clear methodology, minor environment changes can swamp meaningful differences between implementations.

This article outlines a repeatable process: isolate variables, fix test data, automate warm-ups, and publish raw run outputs alongside summary statistics.

Filed under: Performance Engineering, Tooling

`; };

export const html07DefinitionListGlossary = (): string => { return `

Technical Glossary

  • API
  • CSS
  • DOM
  • Latency
  • Refactor
API
A defined set of rules that allows different software systems to communicate with each other.
CSS
A stylesheet language used to control the visual presentation and layout of web documents.
DOM
A programming interface that represents an HTML or XML document as a tree of objects.
Latency
The time delay between a user action and the corresponding response from a system or network.
Refactor
The process of restructuring existing code to improve readability or maintainability without changing behavior.
`; };

export const html02MultiStepCheckoutForm = (): string => { return `
  1. Shipping
  2. Payment
  3. Review
Shipping
Payment
Review
`; };

export const html03NavigationWithDropdownMenus = (): string => { return `
    • New Arrivals
    • Best Sellers
    • Sale
    • Consulting
    • Support
    • Training
    • About Us
    • Careers
    • Contact
`; };
export const html05ResponsiveImageSet = (): string => { return ` `; };

export const html10SearchFormWithAutocomplete = (): string => { return `
  • Apple
  • Apricot
  • Avocado

3 results available.

`.trim(); };

The input did not match the regular expression /new\s+Map/. Input:

'export function fibonacci(n: number): number {\n' +
  '\tconst memo: Record<number, number> = {};\n' +
  '\n' +
  '\tfunction fib(x: number): number {\n' +
  '\t\tif (x <= 1) {\n' +
  '\t\t\treturn x;\n' +
  '\t\t}\n' +
  '\t\tif (memo[x] !== undefined) {\n' +
  '\t\t\treturn memo[x];\n' +
  '\t\t}\n' +
  '\t\tmemo[x] = fib(x - 1) + fib(x - 2);\n' +
  '\t\treturn memo[x];\n' +
  '\t}\n' +
  '\n' +
  '\treturn fib(n);\n' +
  '}'

The input did not match the regular expression /export\s+async\s+function\s+get\s*<\s*T\s*>\s*\(/u. Input:

"import axios from 'axios';\n" +
  '\n' +
  'type HeaderValue = string | number | boolean;\n' +
  'type HeadersMap = Record<string, HeaderValue>;\n' +
  'type QueryParams = Record<string, string | number | boolean | null | undefined>;\n' +
  '\n' +
  'interface ConfigureOptions {\n' +
  '\tbaseURL: string;\n' +
  '\theaders?: HeadersMap;\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'interface PostOptions {\n' +
  '\theaders?: HeadersMap;\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'interface ParsedItem {\n' +
  '\tid: string | number;\n' +
  '\tlabel: string;\n' +
  '\tmeta: Record<string, unknown>;\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  "let baseURL = '';\n" +
  'const defaultHeaders: HeadersMap = {};\n' +
  '\n' +
  'export function configure(options: ConfigureOptions): void {\n' +
  '\tbaseURL = options.baseURL;\n' +
  '\tif (options.headers) {\n' +
  '\t\tObject.assign(defaultHeaders, options.headers);\n' +
  '\t}\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'export async function get<TResponse, TParams extends QueryParams = QueryParams>(\n' +
  '\tpath: string,\n' +
  '\tparams?: TParams,\n' +
  '): Promise<TResponse> {\n' +
  '\tconst response = await axios.get<TResponse>(baseURL + path, {\n' +
  '\t\tparams,\n' +
  '\t\theaders: defaultHeaders,\n' +
  '\t});\n' +
  '\treturn response.data;\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'export async function post<TResponse, TBody = unknown>(\n' +
  '\tpath: string,\n' +
  '\tbody: TBody,\n' +
  '\toptions?: PostOptions,\n' +
  '): Promise<TResponse> {\n' +
  '\tconst response = await axios.post<TResponse>(baseURL + path, body, {\n' +
  '\t\theaders: {\n' +
  '\t\t\t...defaultHeaders,\n' +
  '\t\t\t...(options?.headers ?? {}),\n' +
  '\t\t},\n' +
  '\t});\n' +
  '\treturn response.data;\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'export function buildQueryString(params: QueryParams): string {\n' +
  '\treturn Object.entries(params)\n' +
  '\t\t.filter(([, v]) => v !== undefined && v !== null)\n' +
  '\t\t.map(([k, v]) => `${encodeURIComponent(k)}=${encodeURIComponent(String(v))}`)\n' +
  "\t\t.join('&');\n" +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'function isRecord(value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> {\n' +
  "\treturn typeof value === 'object' && value !== null;\n" +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'function hasItemsArray(\n' +
  '\tvalue: unknown,\n' +
  '): value is { data: { items: unknown[] } } {\n' +
  '\tif (!isRecord(value)) return false;\n' +
  '\tconst data = value.data;\n' +
  '\tif (!isRecord(data)) return false;\n' +
  '\treturn Array.isArray(data.items);\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'function toParsedItem(item: unknown): ParsedItem {\n' +
  '\tif (!isRecord(item)) {\n' +
  "\t\treturn { id: 'unknown', label: 'Unknown', meta: {} };\n" +
  '\t}\n' +
  '\n' +
  '\tconst idRaw = item.id;\n' +
  '\tconst id: string | number =\n' +
  "\t\ttypeof idRaw === 'string' || typeof idRaw === 'number' ? idRaw : 'unknown';\n" +
  '\n' +
  '\tconst name = item.name;\n' +
  '\tconst title = item.title;\n' +
  '\tconst label =\n' +
  "\t\ttypeof name === 'string'\n" +
  '\t\t\t? name\n' +
  "\t\t\t: typeof title === 'string'\n" +
  '\t\t\t\t? title\n' +
  "\t\t\t\t: 'Unknown';\n" +
  '\n' +
  '\tconst meta = isRecord(item.meta) ? item.meta : {};\n' +
  '\n' +
  '\treturn { id, label, meta };\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'export function parseResponse(raw: unknown): ParsedItem[] {\n' +
  '\tif (!hasItemsArray(raw)) {\n' +
  '\t\treturn [];\n' +
  '\t}\n' +
  '\n' +
  '\treturn raw.data.items.map(toParsedItem);\n' +
  '}'

The input was expected to not match the regular expression /PropertyDescriptor/u. Input:

'function log(target: object, key: string, descriptor: PropertyDescriptor): PropertyDescriptor {\n' +
  '\tconst original = descriptor.value as (...args: unknown[]) => unknown;\n' +
  '\tdescriptor.value = function (this: unknown, ...args: unknown[]) {\n' +
  '\t\tconsole.log(`[${key}] called with`, args);\n' +
  '\t\tconst result = original.apply(this, args);\n' +
  '\t\tconsole.log(`[${key}] returned`, result);\n' +
  '\t\treturn result;\n' +
  '\t};\n' +
  '\treturn descriptor;\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  'class Calculator {\n' +
  '\tadd(a: number, b: number): number {\n' +
  '\t\treturn a + b;\n' +
  '\t}\n' +
  '}\n' +
  '\n' +
  '{\n' +
  '\tconst key = "add";\n' +
  '\tconst descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(Calculator.prototype, key);\n' +
  '\tif (descriptor) {\n' +
  '\t\tObject.defineProperty(Calculator.prototype, key, log(Calculator.prototype, key, descriptor));\n' +
  '\t}\n' +
  '}'
Unexpected token ':'
